description: Determine peaks in the spectrum using a series of digital filters.
author: D.R. Mani, Broad Institute
plan:
## Peaks GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Peaks is a GenePattern module that Determine peaks in the spectrum using a series of digital filters.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 10 parameters:
- Required: spectrum.filename, percentile, smoothing.size, adaptive.background.correction.strength, adaptive.background.correction.size, high.pass.filter.strength, high.pass.filter.factor, output.file
- Optional: low.Da, high.Da

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>pipeline.wrapper.R peaks.wrapper <spectrum.filename> <output.file> <libdir> -l<low.Da> -h<high.Da> -p<percentile> -a<smoothing.size> -b<adaptive.background.correction.strength> -c<adaptive.background.correction.size> -d<high.pass.filter.strength> -e<high.pass.filter.factor>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: percentile
parameters.description: After applying filters, threshold above which peaks are located

parameters.name: adaptive.background.correction.strength
parameters.description: Strength of the adaptive background correction filter

parameters.name: adaptive.background.correction.size
parameters.description: Size of the adaptive background correction filter

parameters.name: high.pass.filter.strength
parameters.description: Strength of the high pass filter

parameters.name: high.pass.filter.factor
parameters.description: Filter factor for the high pass filter
